steps.prompt_snapshot:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['review']
Prompt family: review
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Perform a detailed, step-by-step analysis of the provided problem to reach a tentative answer. Then, send one reviewer child a request to specifically audit your analysis for logical errors, missed details, or misinterpretations of the input data.

In your draft_response, provide the FINAL_ANSWER and a concise JUSTIFICATION. In your message_for_reviewer, instruct the child to act as a critical auditor, looking for specific flaws in your step-by-step reasoning.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "review",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "draft_response": "plain-text draft answer",
  "message_for_reviewer": "plain-text review request for the child"
}
Additional instruction prompt profiles: []
System prompt:


User prompt:

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B7-sarcasm-classification
Title: B7. Sarcasm Classification

Problem:
Classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1).
Determine the 3-bit pattern.

Grading target:
Exact match on the 3-bit string.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

authored_response.decision_notes: The user provided the question title and ID but did not provide the actual text of the three Reddit replies to be classified. I cannot perform the analysis without the input data. I will request the input data or, if this is a template test, I will note the missing data.
authored_response.draft_response:
FINAL_ANSWER: DATA_MISSING
JUSTIFICATION: The problem description provides the task (classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic or non-sarcastic) but fails to provide the actual text of the three replies required to perform the classification.
authored_response.message_for_reviewer: Please audit my analysis. Note that the input provided in the prompt contains the question ID and title ('B7. Sarcasm Classification') but is missing the actual content (the three Reddit replies) needed to solve the problem. Check if I have correctly identified that the problem is unsolvable due to missing input data, or if I have missed any implicit data within the ID/Title.
